The question is asking to determine the number of seasons where the team was champion of the German Cup. Since each row represents a season and the "german cup" column indicates the performance in that season, we need to group by the "german cup" column to count how many times "champion" appears. We can use the f_group_column(german cup) operation to group the seasons based on their German Cup performance to analyze this situation.
Based on the grouped data, the team was champion of the German Cup in 4 seasons.
